description: Merge LLM Log Viewer into Manager — convert standalone LogServer to Hono sub-routes mounted on the main server, remove independent port

userStories.title: Convert LogServer to Hono sub-routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the log viewer API converted from a standalone Bun.serve() server to Hono sub-routes so it can be mounted on the main server.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/log/routes.ts exporting LogViewerRoutes as a lazy Hono sub-router (same pattern as MemoryRoutes in src/memory/web/api.ts)

Move all API route handlers from src/log/server.ts handleApiRoute() into Hono route definitions: GET /api/logs, GET /api/logs/stats, GET /api/logs/analyze, GET /api/logs/:id, POST /api/logs/:id/annotations, DELETE /api/logs/annotations/:id, POST /api/logs/cleanup, GET /api/health
Add GET /app route serving embedded log-viewer HTML (same pattern as MemoryRoutes /app route using import with { type: 'text' })
Serve embedded log-viewer static assets (JS/CSS) via GET /assets/* route using the OPENCODE_LOG_VIEWER_ASSETS global
SPA fallback: non-API, non-asset routes return index.html for client-side routing
Remove CORS headers (main server handles CORS via Hono middleware)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Created src/log/routes.ts with lazy Hono sub-router. All API routes ported from handleApiRoute(). Assets served via /app and /app/* routes using OPENCODE_LOG_VIEWER_ASSETS global. SPA fallback returns index.html for unmatched paths.

userStories.title: Mount LogViewerRoutes on main server
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the log viewer routes mounted on the main server so they're accessible at /log-viewer/*.
acceptanceCriteria: Import LogViewerRoutes in src/server/server.ts
Add .route('/log-viewer', LogViewerRoutes()) to the main Hono app chain (after MemoryRoutes, before ManagerRoutes)
Verify /log-viewer/app serves the log viewer HTML page
Verify /log-viewer/api/logs returns log data
Verify /log-viewer/api/health returns { status: 'ok' }
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added import and .route('/log-viewer', LogViewerRoutes()) between MemoryRoutes and ManagerRoutes in server.ts.

userStories.title: Update manager.ts to remove independent LogServer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the manager CLI command to stop launching a separate LogServer and instead use the main server's /log-viewer/ routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove import of LogServer from manager.ts
Remove LogServer.start({ port: logViewerPort }) call
Remove --log-viewer-port CLI option
Remove logViewer.stop() from shutdown handler
Update ManagerState.register() log-viewer service entry: url changes from logViewer.url to `${mainBaseUrl}/log-viewer/app`
Update services array: Log Viewer path becomes '/log-viewer/app', url becomes `${mainBaseUrl}/log-viewer/app`
Update switch case 'log-viewer': openUrl becomes `${mainBaseUrl}/log-viewer/app`
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Removed LogServer import, start call, --log-viewer-port option, and logViewer.stop(). All URLs updated to use ${mainBaseUrl}/log-viewer/app. Added --reset-logs option.

userStories.title: Remove standalone log-viewer CLI command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove the independent opencode log-viewer CLI subcommand since log viewer is now accessed via the manager.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete src/cli/cmd/log-viewer.ts
Remove LogViewerCommand import and registration from src/index.ts
Preserve the LlmLog.reset() functionality — add --reset-logs option to the manager command instead
Manager --reset-logs flag calls LlmLog.reset(), prints result, and exits (no server start)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Deleted log-viewer.ts. Removed import and .command(LogViewerCommand) from index.ts. Reset functionality moved to manager --reset-logs flag.

userStories.title: Update log-viewer web app API base path
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the log-viewer React app to use /log-viewer/api/ as its API base path instead of /api/.
acceptanceCriteria: Find and update the API base URL in packages/log-viewer/ source code from /api/ to /log-viewer/api/
If there's an API client or fetch wrapper, update the base path there
If API URLs are hardcoded in components, update each one
Vite dev server proxy config updated to match new path prefix
Build and verify the log-viewer package compiles successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated all 7 fetch calls across 4 pages from /api/ to /log-viewer/api/. Updated vite.config.ts base to /log-viewer/app/ and proxy to /log-viewer/api. Added basename: '/log-viewer/app' to createBrowserRouter. Build succeeds.

userStories.title: Clean up src/log/server.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove the standalone server code from src/log/server.ts since it's replaced by Hono routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove or simplify src/log/server.ts — keep only if helper functions are reused by routes.ts, otherwise delete the file
Remove tryPort(), start(), ServerOptions, ServerInstance exports that are no longer needed
Remove standalone Bun.serve() related code (handleRequest, serveStaticFile, serveEmbeddedAsset)
Ensure no other files import from src/log/server.ts (check manager.ts, log-viewer.ts already removed)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Deleted src/log/server.ts entirely. All helper functions (parseListFilters etc) were reimplemented in routes.ts. No remaining imports.
